instances.prompt: A photorealistic black hole in deep space. The black hole has a perfectly dark event horizon at its center, surrounded by a blazing accretion disk of superheated gas glowing in vivid shades of orange, yellow, and white. Gravitational lensing distorts the light and background stars around the event horizon, creating a warped halo effect. The surrounding space is filled with a dense star field and faint nebula clouds in deep blues and purples. The scene is scientifically accurate, inspired by real astrophysics imagery, ultra-high detail, cinematic lighting, 8K resolution.
